descriptionKey.english: Cael and his cherubs grant +[effect0.power][health] and [spikes] [effect1.power] to enemy units.
descriptionKey.french: Cael et ses chérubins octroient +[effect0.power][health] et [spikes] [effect1.power] aux ennemis.
descriptionKey.german: Cael und seine Cherubim gewähren gegnerischen Einheiten +[effect0.power][health] und [spikes] [effect1.power].
descriptionKey.russian: Каэль и херувимы дают своим бойцам +[effect0.power][health] и [spikes] [effect1.power].
descriptionKey.portuguese: Cael e seus querubins concedem +[effect0.power][health] e [spikes] [effect1.power] às unidades inimigas.
descriptionKey.chinese: 凯尔和他的小天使会使敌方单位获得 +[effect0.power][health] 和 [spikes] [effect1.power]。
descriptionKey.spanish: Cael y sus querubines otorgan +[effect0.power][health] y [spikes] [effect1.power] a las unidades enemigas.
descriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 凱爾和他的天使寶寶賦予敵方單位+[effect0.power][health]和[spikes][effect1.power]。
descriptionKey.korean: 카엘과 카엘의 케루빔이 적 유닛에 +[effect0.power][health] 및 [spikes] [effect1.power] 효과를 부여합니다.
descriptionKey.japanese: キャエルと智天使が敵ユニットに+[effect0.power][health]と[spikes] [effect1.power]を付与する。
